description: These sandals from lotto with bright coloured straps are perfect for those with an exuberant spirit. Wear this with casual t-shirts and bermudas or denims.UpperFabric straps for the midfoot, forefoot and ankle with rubber lining for structureAdjustable ankle strapsStitch detailing on the strapsSoft rubber textured footbed for instep comfortFootbed stitched to the outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleTPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and tractionBranding on the outsoleSandal careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
